changelog:
阅读Archive 第十版问题修复更新

本次更新集中修复近期反馈的阅读页、书架、目录、书源管理、主题、导出和 Compose 新界面兼容性问题，并针对 OOM 与部分机型崩溃做了稳定性加固。

新增：
- 新增 Compose 快速滑动条，覆盖书架、目录、搜索结果、设置管理等长列表页面。
- 新增书籍详情 useWeb 弹窗多窗口支持，修复 WebView 内图片弹窗无法正常加载的问题。
- 新增应用主题手动新建入口，可基于当前配置生成组合主题并进入编辑。

优化：
- 优化目录页顶部与分卷展示，保留吸顶分卷，同时避免章节内容从透明卷标题下透出。
- 优化正文菜单顶部按钮触控区域，减少“换源 / 刷新 / 缓存”等操作误触。
- 优化正文长按菜单布局，改善部分机型按钮提前换行、右侧留白的问题。
- 优化老三键导航栏适配，阅读菜单、弹窗和统计页底部内容避开系统导航栏。
- 优化朗读页封面获取逻辑，使用更完整的封面解析结果。
- 优化启动页逻辑，默认使用系统 splash 和应用图标，减少启动黑屏、白闪和欢迎页停顿。
- 优化应用主题导出结构，根目录直接写入 appearance_kit.json，并允许仅布局/默认组件配置导出。

修复：
- 修复书源、RSS 等管理页胶囊开关点击后 UI 不实时更新的问题。
- 修复书源管理拖拽排序后状态不同步、需要退出重进才显示的问题。
- 修复管理列表同对象更新时 Compose 行项目不刷新的问题。
- 修复发现页、书架页透明顶栏下列表内容透出的显示问题。
- 修复阅读页、详情页、搜索进入阅读后返回路径不一致的问题，现在统一回到书架。
- 修复阅读页 Android 10 设备可能一直显示“数据加载中”的问题。
- 修复目录页分卷吸顶后无法回落、章节无法滑到顶部的问题。
- 修复快速滑动条透明触摸层遮挡书源、RSS 等管理页编辑/更多/开关按钮的问题。
- 修复搜索结果 LazyColumn 重复 key 导致偶发崩溃的问题。
- 修复正文刷新长按选项丢失的问题。
- 修复 AI 内置阅读菜单按钮删除后无法重新添加的问题。
- 修复正文虚拟气泡图片 dp: 路径被错误缓存/下载的问题。
- 修复主题圆球中文字溢出圆形区域的问题。
- 修复主题、封面、背景等 Compose 图片释放时可能触发 Glide destroyed activity 崩溃的问题。
- 修复沉浸式顶栏、主题预览、封面集合等页面销毁时 Glide 加载崩溃的问题。
- 修复卓易通等环境导出的 zip 包可能无法解压的问题，并增加导出后 zip 可读性校验。
- 修复主题 zip 文件通过文件关联打开时识别不完整的问题。
- 修复应用主题 zip 因 appearance_kit.json 位于嵌套目录而被误判为普通主题包、提示缺少 theme.json 的问题。
- 修复普通界面主题导入入口误选应用主题包时仍走 theme.json 检查的问题。
- 修复旧版/已导出的嵌套应用主题包无法从文件关联和管理页正常导入的问题。
- 修复更新弹窗底部留白过大的问题。
- 修复统计页底部内容被主界面悬浮底栏遮挡的问题。
- 修复本地文件保存、压缩包图片读取、data-url 图片、用户图片解码等场景的 OOM 风险。
- 修复路径包含性检查不严格带来的潜在安全风险。
- 修复缓存大小估算不准导致内存缓存风险偏高的问题。
- 修复详情页云端入口选中状态不可见的问题。
- 修复段落规则编辑器启动阻塞过久的问题。

本次共整理并修复 36 类问题，重点是 Compose 改造后的实时刷新、列表滚动、弹窗布局、系统导航栏适配、WebView 弹窗、应用主题导入导出和内存稳定性。

阅读Archive 第十版补充更新

祝大家端午安康。本次更新修复了若干功能，新增了若干 bug，UI 大范围升级为 Compose 控件，并支持导入非加密 .red 文件。

新增：
- 支持导入非加密 .red 主题文件，兼容 RED v4、Red10 等主题包格式。
- 新增主题管理与预览能力，支持主题重命名、编辑、删除和应用。
- 新增主题扩展颜色、背景图片、GIF / WebP 动态背景资源识别与绑定。
- 新增书架布局实时预览，可在调整封面尺寸、排列方式、列表样式时直接查看效果。
- 新增书架 Compose 网格与列表样式，封面、书名、作者、未读角标、分组标签展示更统一。
- 新增阅读页新版菜单，整合顶部工具栏、书源操作、刷新、缓存、更多操作等入口。
- 新增阅读页新版进度、亮度、边距等调节控件，交互更接近新版 UI 风格。
- 新增 usehtml 文本框与容器盒模型能力，支持对齐、缩进、边距、宽高、圆角、背景和分页容器等效果。
- 新增漫画颜色滤镜、底部设置、电子纸相关设置的新界面。
- 新增朗读、视频、音频跳过片头片尾等配置的新式弹窗体验。

优化：
- UI 大范围升级为 Compose 控件，常用弹窗、设置项、动作菜单、列表行、底部面板等整体样式更加统一。
- 优化设置中心体验，备份、主题、封面、发现、订阅、AI、朗读、阅读设置等页面视觉与交互更一致。
- 优化通用弹窗体验，输入、多选、确认、文本列表、动作列表、数字选择、来源选择等弹窗滚动和按钮布局更稳定。
- 优化阅读菜单视觉层级，减少多余阴影、分割线和拥挤的文字按钮。
- 优化书源操作菜单、VIP 章节购买入口、刷新和缓存入口的显示逻辑。
- 优化书架卡片与封面显示，列表封面更大，未读角标和标签位置更清晰。
- 优化书架滚动状态保存、刷新、布局切换和重建逻辑。
- 优化目录页体验，搜索、标签、空状态、加载状态和当前章节高亮更清楚。
- 优化阅读记录页面，概览、排行、目标卡片、封面行和组件配置展示更统一。
- 优化发现页现代列表和网格，减少滚动抖动、刷新开销和列表重组。
- 优化书源、替换规则等管理列表，统一行样式、勾选反馈、开关状态和批量管理表现。
- 优化动图背景播放，顶部栏和主页背景中的 GIF / WebP 更可靠地保持动画效果。
- 优化封面显示分辨率，不同页面中的封面清晰度和尺寸表现更一致。
- 优化数据库查询，减少书架匹配、阅读记录面板等场景对完整书籍数据的读取。

修复：
- 修复登录或脚本触发 showBrowser 底部浏览器时，部分系统全面屏返回无法正常收起的问题。
- 修复从弹出菜单等临时上下文触发 showBrowser 时，Activity 生命周期异常可能导致崩溃的问题。
- 修复 showBrowser 内 WebView 返回、网页全屏、自定义历史栈处理在部分入口下不一致的问题。
- 修复书库容器管理页转为 Compose 后缺少导入、导出入口的问题。
- 修复发现页现代列表在滚动时内容透过标签栏显示的问题。
- 修复发现页部分 tag 只有少量书籍时，到达底部后持续触发加载的问题。
- 修复段落规则点击、图片点击、usehtml 气泡点击等场景中的点击来源传递问题。
- 修复 usehtml 文本框标点对齐、测量行对齐、右对齐裁剪和细微偏移问题。
- 修复 usehtml 容器在分页时圆角、背景和边距显示异常的问题。
- 修复阅读页滑杆拖动被背景层拦截、亮度和进度调节不顺畅的问题。
- 修复阅读页背景点击关闭、菜单进出动画、白闪、底部对齐等交互细节。
- 修复 VIP 章节购买入口在阅读菜单和书源弹窗中的显示问题。
- 修复书架布局切换后内容未及时重建、滚动回调失效、刷新状态不一致的问题。
- 修复目录页缺少书籍数据、刷新处理、搜索滚动和空状态显示问题。
- 修复发现页现代列表滚动异常和下拉刷新后标签缺失问题。
- 修复主题导入格式兼容、透明度应用、主题刷新和编辑草稿状态丢失问题。
- 修复顶部栏动图背景裁剪、保存、播放和默认标签透明度相关问题。
- 修复配置页工具栏菜单空间、设置跳转、禁用状态、选择弹窗即时反馈等问题。
- 修复漫画滤镜预览刷新过频、底部设置状态恢复不完整的问题。
- 修复搜索页、书签页、导入勾选、日志和更新类弹窗等多处界面显示与交互细节。

阅读Archive 第九版补充更新

修复：
- 修复界面设置-底栏管理中，底栏编辑弹窗内容较多时无法上下滑动的问题。
- 修复书架右上角“管理标签”只显示用户自建分组的问题，现在会同时显示系统分组，并支持本地、音频、视频、更新失败、网络未分组、本地未分组等系统分组的标签管理。

阅读Archive 第九版补充更新

新增：
- 新增沉浸式 Compose 书籍详情页，支持在详情页管理中切换新版/旧版详情页。
- 新增阅读页问 AI 的 Compose 对话界面，支持 Markdown 渲染、消息复制、思考过程展示和全屏问答。
- 新增 HTTP TTS 规则 WebSocket JS 桥接能力，支持复用连接，减少部分 WebSocket TTS 每句重连造成的卡顿。
- 新增多角色分配明细手动修正能力，可在分配信息中调整错误的角色分配。
- 新增 AI 页右侧跳转控制自动收起，滚动时从右侧显示，停止滚动后自动隐藏。

修复：

新增：

- 段落规则独立于书源存在，可在阅读页右上角「段落规则管理」中为当前书单独启用。

本次更新集中修复近期反馈的阅读页、书架、目录、书源管理、主题、导出和 Compose 新界面兼容性问题，并针对 OOM 与部分机型崩溃做了稳定性加固。

- 修复正文刷新长按选项丢失的问题。
- 修复 AI 内置阅读菜单按钮删除后无法重新添加的问题。

- 修复段落规则编辑器启动阻塞过久的问题。

本次共整理并修复 36 类问题，重点是 Compose 改造后的实时刷新、列表滚动、弹窗布局、系统导航栏适配、WebView 弹窗、应用主题导入导出和内存稳定性。

## Release Highlight
* Reading: Fixed full-page cover images and cover backgrounds that didn't display correctly under a page texture
* Reading: Fixed a crash when opening large PDF files on mobile devices
* Reading: You can now save or share an image straight from the image viewer
* Speed Reading: Fixed the control bar overlapping the playback controls on mobile
* Sync: Books without a reading status no longer jump back to the top after every sync
* Sync: Your per-device reading view settings now stay local instead of syncing between devices
* OPDS: Fixed the Add Catalog dialog appearing behind Settings on mobile

## Release Highlight
* Reading: Added Word Lens, which shows a quick translation above difficult words as you read
* Reading: Added real page numbers from the book's own page list, and the current page now appears under the active chapter in the table of contents
* Reading: Added Webtoon Mode for seamless, gap-free scrolling through comics and image books, and you can now tap an image or table to open it full-screen
* Reading Stats: Track your reading time and pages, now synced across your devices and with KOReader
* Library: Unlock the app with your fingerprint or Face ID, browse books by series in list view, search any title on Goodreads
* Integrations: Hardcover progress and notes sync automatically, OPDS catalogs gained search and richer descriptions
* Text-to-Speech: Words are highlighted one at a time as they're read aloud, with read-along following you through paragraph and speed reading modes
* Speed Reading: Added a start delay, word-by-word stepping, dictionary lookups, keyboard shortcuts, and your reading font now styles the focused word
* Dictionary: Word variations now resolve to their base forms, with more reliable system dictionary lookups on Android and iOS
* Annotations: Customize the highlight toolbar, share selected text to other apps, and highlights now render correctly over bulleted lists
* Platform: Added an opt-in nightly update channel for early access to new features, plus faster, smoother reading and many platform fixes

## Release Highlight
* Library: You can now send a book file directly from the bookshelf selection popup
* Reading: Wide tables now scroll sideways, and oversized images or code blocks scroll in place instead of accidentally turning the page
* Reading: Fixed page backgrounds, textures, and full-page cover images that didn't display correctly in paginated and scrolled modes
* Reading: Fixed bright table and note backgrounds that didn't match the page in dark mode
* Reading: Fixed the reading ruler drifting while scrolling and a stray line at the bottom of the page
* Fonts: Fixed custom fonts disappearing after re-importing, and they now apply correctly inside books
* PDF: Fixed scanned PDFs not displaying in installed app builds
* Annotations: The annotation list now scrolls back to your nearest highlight, and exporting to Readwise works again on desktop
* Android: Fixed a freeze when long-pressing images, plus issues with copying text and opening books directly from other apps
* Fixes: Kept the book menu order stable, synced KOReader book covers, and fixed a Windows launch crash

## Release Highlight
* Send to Readest: Clip web pages and articles into your library via the system share sheet, or by emailing them in
* Dictionary: Look up words with your device's built-in system dictionary on macOS, iOS, and Android, plus faster MDict and StarDict imports
* Library: Import books from a folder with format and size filters, or read them in place from external folders without copying
* Reading: The reading ruler now follows individual lines, you can swipe along the edge to adjust brightness on mobile, and customize hardware-button page turning
* Annotations: Create global highlights that apply to every matching passage in a book
* Text-to-Speech: Added a hotkey to highlight the sentence being read aloud, and made TTS more reliable
* Fonts: Fixed custom fonts disappearing after restarting or reloading the app
* iOS: Fixed the reader not updating when you switch between light and dark mode
* Android: Fixed an issue where highlighting text could trigger unintended page turns
* Fixes: Many improvements across PDFs, EPUBs, Sync, Scrolling, Highlighting

## Release Highlight
* Dictionaries: You can now import your own StarDict and MDict dictionaries
* Sync: Your custom dictionaries, custom fonts, background textures and OPDS catalogs now sync across devices
* KOReader Sync: Browse your full Readest Library from inside KOReader, with improved sync diagnostics
* OPDS: Stream books over OPDS-PSE and optionally auto-download new titles from feeds
* Sharing: Create share links for books, jump directly to book via deep links in exported annotations
* Library: Added an optional 4-digit PIN lock at app launch to keep your library private
* Library: You can now drag entire folders to import books
* Reading: Added support for inline CJK ruby annotations (warichu/Gezhu), improved footnote detection
* Speed Reading: Reading position now resumes correctly across devices and inside long sections
* Fixes: Many fixes across PDFs, MOBIs, EPUBs, TTS, scrolling, and accessibility

## Release Highlight
* Library: Much faster browsing for large collections
* Reading: Added an option to keep the book's original paragraph layout
* Reading: Fixed page navigation for Arabic books
* PDF: Fixed TTS reading interruptions at line breaks in PDFs
* PDF: You can now apply your chosen theme colors to PDFs
* Sync: Added HTTP Basic auth support for CWA
* Sync: Improved progress sync with Hardcover.app
* OPDS: You can now edit your registered catalogs, with better handling of download filenames
* Speed Reading: Your reading position now syncs across devices
* Platform: Fixed window buttons on macOS, reduced crashes on iOS

## Release Highlight
* Reading: Added a reading ruler (line highlight) to help guide your eyes while reading

* Reading: Added a speed reading mode to support faster reading workflows
* Reading: Added support for gamepad input to turn pages

* Annotations: Expanded highlight customization with more color options

* Library: Added grouping by author and series for better library organization
* Library: Added support of marking books as finished
* Search: Added fuzzy search to quickly find settings even with partial keywords
* Table of Contents: Added page numbers for nested TOC entries

* E-ink: Improved color support for color E-ink devices to display richer highlights

## Release Highlight
* Bookshelf: Added the ability to export original book files directly from the book details dialog
* Bookshelf: Added a new sorting option to organize books by publish date
* Bookshelf: Improved performance for large library with faster and more stable imports
* OPDS: Improved download reliability by correctly detecting filenames for PDF and CBZ files
* Proofreading: Added support for whole-word replacement to make text corrections more precise
* Notes: Added the ability to export notes using a customizable template
* PDF: Added support for panning within PDF documents for easier navigation
* PDF: Improved performance by pre-rendering the next page for smoother page transitions
* Text-to-Speech: Added support for word replacement to improve pronunciation during playback
* Text-to-Speech: Fixed an issue where playback speed settings were not applied correctly on Linux
* E-ink: Improved reading stability by preventing unwanted scrolling when animations are disabled or on e-ink devices
* Discord: Added Discord Rich Presence to display your current reading status on Desktop platforms
* Android: Fixed an issue that could cause occasional crashes during app startup
* Fonts: Improved web font loading for faster and more stable text rendering

* Text-to-Speech: Reduced excessive pauses between sentences for smoother playback

* Android: Fixed highlighting of the current sentence when using native Android text-to-speech
* Android: Back button handling now works correctly on Android 15 and above
* Android: You can now open files shared from other apps
